page.title: File:Announcement of the decipherement of Brahmi letters by Lassen in the JASB in 1836.jpg

revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:File:Announcement of the decipherement of Brahmi letters by Lassen in the JASB in 1836.jpg]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of File:Announcement of the decipherement of Brahmi letters by Lassen in the JASB in 1836.jpg]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
revision.text: #redirect[[en:File:Announcement of the decipherement of Brahmi letters by Lassen in the JASB in 1836.jpg]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of File:Announcement of the decipherement of Brahmi letters by Lassen in the JASB in 1836.jpg]]</includeonly>
